```{r General setup and parameter preparation, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
suppressMessages(pak::pak("Brar/neoipcr@initial_tests"))
suppressMessages(library(kableExtra, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE))
suppressMessages(library(tidyverse, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE))
suppressMessages(library(scales, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE))
suppressMessages(library(patchwork, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE))
#suppressMessages(library(exactRankTests, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE))
suppressMessages(library(neoipcr, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE))

reportingPeriodFrom <- as_date(coalesce(params[["reportingPeriodFrom"]], "2024-01-01"))
reportingPeriodTo <- as_date(coalesce(params[["reportingPeriodTo"]], Sys.Date()))
birthWeightFrom <- coalesce(params[["birthWeightFrom"]], 0L)
birthWeightTo <- coalesce(params[["birthWeightTo"]], 2147483647L)
gestationalAgeFrom <- coalesce(params[["gestationalAgeFrom"]], 0L)
gestationalAgeTo <- coalesce(params[["gestationalAgeTo"]], 2147483647L)
token <- coalesce(params[["token"]], Sys.getenv("NEOIPC_DHIS2_TOKEN", unset = NA))
session_id <- coalesce(params[["session_id"]], Sys.getenv("NEOIPC_DHIS2_SESSION_ID", unset = NA))
countryFilter = params[["countryFilter"]]
hospitalFilter = params[["hospitalFilter"]]
defaultPatientFilter = coalesce(params[["defaultPatientFilter"]], TRUE)
testUnitFilter = coalesce(params[["testUnitFilter"]], TRUE)
locale <- if(!exists("locale")) NULL else locale
data <- if(!rlang::is_na(session_id)) import_dhis2(connection_options = dhis2_connection_options(session_id = session_id), locale = locale) else if(!rlang::is_na(token)) import_dhis2(connection_options = dhis2_connection_options(token = token), locale = locale) else import_dhis2(locale = locale)

fn <- function(x) format(x, big.mark =" ")
fd <- function(x) format(x, digits = 2, nsmall = 1, scientific = FALSE, big.mark =" ")
label_week <- function(x) paste(fn(x), "w", sep = " ")
label_gram <- function(x) paste(fn(x), "g", sep = " ")
format_ga <- function(x, add_unit = TRUE) paste(fn(as.integer(x / 7)), if(add_unit){label_week(x %% 7)}else{ x %% 7}, sep = "+")

```

```{r Filtering}
countries <- data$metadata$countries

if(!rlang::is_null(countryFilter))
  countries <- countries |>
    dplyr::filter(code %in% countryFilter)

hospitals <- data$metadata$hospitals |>
  dplyr::semi_join(countries, dplyr::join_by(country_code == code))

if(!rlang::is_null(hospitalFilter))
  hospitals <- hospitals |>
    dplyr::filter(code %in% hospitalFilter)

departments <- data$metadata$departments |>
    dplyr::filter(is.na(hospital) | hospital %in% hospitals$key)

if(testUnitFilter)
  departments <- departments |>
      dplyr::filter(isTestUnit == FALSE)

enrollments <- data$enrollments |>
  dplyr::semi_join(departments, dplyr::join_by(enrollment_department == key))

incomplete_enrollments <- enrollments |>
  filter((is.null(surveillanceEnd_status) | is.na(surveillanceEnd_status) | surveillanceEnd_status != "COMPLETED") &
      (is.null(surveillanceEnd_completedAt) | is.na(surveillanceEnd_completedAt) | (
          surveillanceEnd_completedAt >= reportingPeriodFrom &
            surveillanceEnd_completedAt <= reportingPeriodTo)))

enrollments <- enrollments |>
  filter(
    # We don't filter for completed enrollments since there currently is no
    # good reason (like some sort of validation) attached to the completion
    # of enrollments and we'd loose a lot of otherwise perfectly valid patients
    # because people don't seem to understand the concept of completing an
    # enrollment.
    # We may carefully reconsider this decision at some point in the future if
    # a good reason comes up but we'll have to put a lot of emphasis on training
    # our partners before doing so
    admission_status == "COMPLETED" &
      surveillanceEnd_status == "COMPLETED" &
      surveillanceEnd_completedAt >= reportingPeriodFrom &
      surveillanceEnd_completedAt <= reportingPeriodTo)

patients <- data$patients |>
  # don't include patients that aren't enrolled in one of the selected sites
  dplyr::semi_join(enrollments, dplyr::join_by(key == patient)) |>
  dplyr::filter(
    NEOIPC_TEA_BIRTH_WEIGHT >= birthWeightFrom &
      NEOIPC_TEA_BIRTH_WEIGHT <= birthWeightTo &
      NeoIPC_TEA_TOTAL_GESTATION_DAYS >= gestationalAgeFrom &
      NeoIPC_TEA_TOTAL_GESTATION_DAYS <= gestationalAgeTo) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    decimal_gestational_age = NeoIPC_TEA_TOTAL_GESTATION_DAYS / 7,
    multiple_birth_category = ordered(case_when(
      NEOIPC_TEA_SIBLINGS == 1 ~ trnsl$multipleBirthCategories$singleBirth,
      NEOIPC_TEA_SIBLINGS == 2 ~ trnsl$multipleBirthCategories$twins,
      NEOIPC_TEA_SIBLINGS >= 3 ~ trnsl$multipleBirthCategories$tripletsOrMore
      ), levels = unlist(trnsl$multipleBirthCategories)))

incomplete_patients <- data$patients |>
  dplyr::semi_join(incomplete_enrollments, dplyr::join_by(key == patient)) |>
  dplyr::filter(
    NEOIPC_TEA_BIRTH_WEIGHT >= birthWeightFrom &
      NEOIPC_TEA_BIRTH_WEIGHT <= birthWeightTo &
      NeoIPC_TEA_TOTAL_GESTATION_DAYS >= gestationalAgeFrom &
      NeoIPC_TEA_TOTAL_GESTATION_DAYS <= gestationalAgeTo)

if(defaultPatientFilter){
  patients <- patients |>
      filter(NEOIPC_TEA_BIRTH_WEIGHT < 1500 | NeoIPC_TEA_TOTAL_GESTATION_DAYS < 224)
  incomplete_patients <- incomplete_patients |>
      filter(NEOIPC_TEA_BIRTH_WEIGHT < 1500 | NeoIPC_TEA_TOTAL_GESTATION_DAYS < 224)
}

# Apply filters in reverse order to remove irrelevant entries from tables that
# are higher in the hierarchy
enrollments <- enrollments |>
  semi_join(patients, dplyr::join_by(patient == key))

incomplete_enrollments <- incomplete_enrollments |>
  semi_join(incomplete_patients, dplyr::join_by(patient == key))

departments <- departments |>
  semi_join(enrollments, dplyr::join_by(key == enrollment_department))

hospitals <- hospitals |>
  semi_join(departments, dplyr::join_by(key == hospital))

countries <- countries |>
  semi_join(hospitals, dplyr::join_by(code == country_code))

# filter the actual data
department_denominators <- enrollments |>
    mutate(
        NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_VENT_DAYS =
            NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_INV_DAYS +
            NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_NIV_DAYS,
        .before = NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_INV_DAYS) |>
  mutate(across(ends_with("_DAYS"), ~ .x > 0, .names = "{.col}_ANY")) |>
  group_by(enrollment_department) |>
  summarise(
    across(
      matches("_DAYS(_ANY)?$"),
      sum,
      .names = "{.col}_SUM")) |>
  inner_join(
    enrollments |>
      group_by(enrollment_department) |>
      summarise(
        patientCount = n_distinct(patient)),
    join_by(enrollment_department)) |>
  rename(department = enrollment_department)

total_denominators <- department_denominators |>
  reframe(across(!"department", sum))

totDept <- nrow(departments)
totPat <- total_denominators$patientCount
totEnr <- total_denominators$NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_ANY_SUM
totPatDay <- total_denominators$NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_SUM
totIncPat <- nrow(incomplete_patients)

sepses <- data$sepses |>
  filter(status == "COMPLETED") |>
  semi_join(enrollments, join_by(enrollment == key))

pneumonias <- data$pneumonias |>
  filter(status == "COMPLETED") |>
  semi_join(enrollments, join_by(enrollment == key))

necs <- data$necs |>
  filter(status == "COMPLETED") |>
  semi_join(enrollments, join_by(enrollment == key))

ssis <- data$ssis |>
  filter(status == "COMPLETED") |>
  semi_join(enrollments, join_by(enrollment == key))

causative_pathogens <- data$causative_pathogens |>
  semi_join(bind_rows(
    sepses |> select(key, eventType),
    pneumonias |> select(key, eventType),
    necs |> select(key, eventType),
    ssis |> select(key, eventType)
  ), join_by(key, eventType))

department_sepses <- sepses |>
    left_join(
        causative_pathogens |>
            semi_join(sepses, join_by(key, eventType)) |>
            group_by(key) |>
            summarise(
                maxSource = factor(max(as.integer(if(length(PATHOGEN_SOURCE) > 0){PATHOGEN_SOURCE}else{NA})), levels = c(1,2,3)),
                .groups = "drop"), join_by(key)) |>
    group_by(department, bsiType, NEOIPC_BSI_DEV_ASS, maxSource) |>
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  inner_join(
    data$metadata$sepsisDeviceAssociation |>
      select(code, displayName) |>
      rename(dev = displayName),
    join_by(NEOIPC_BSI_DEV_ASS == code)) |>
  left_join(
    data$metadata$sepsisPathogenSources |>
      select(code, displayName) |>
      rename(source = displayName),
    join_by(maxSource == code)) |>
  mutate(source = factor(replace_na(as.character(source), "None"), levels = c("None", levels(source)))) |>
  select(!c(NEOIPC_BSI_DEV_ASS, maxSource)) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = c(bsiType, dev, source),
    names_expand = TRUE,
    names_sort = TRUE,
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0) |>
  mutate(
    Tot = rowSums(across(!department)),
    BSI = rowSums(across(starts_with("BSI"))),
    CoNS = rowSums(across(starts_with("CoNS"))),
    Clin = rowSums(across(starts_with("Clin"))),
    CVC = rowSums(across(contains("_CVC-associated_"))),
    PVC = rowSums(across(contains("_PVC-associated_"))),
    CSF = rowSums(across(ends_with("Cerebrospinal fluid"))),
    .after = department,
    .keep = "unused")

total_sepses <- department_sepses |>
  reframe(across(!"department", sum))

department_sepsis_rates = department_sepses |>
  inner_join(department_denominators, join_by(department)) |>
  mutate(
    department = department,
    Tot_I = Tot / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_ANY_SUM * 100,
    Tot_D = Tot / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_SUM * 1000,
    BSI_I = BSI / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_ANY_SUM * 100,
    BSI_D = BSI / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_SUM * 1000,
    CoNS_I = CoNS / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_ANY_SUM * 100,
    CoNS_D = CoNS / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_SUM * 1000,
    Clin_I = Clin / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_ANY_SUM * 100,
    Clin_D = Clin / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_SUM * 1000,
    CVC_I = CVC / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_CVC_DAYS_ANY_SUM * 100,
    CVC_D = CVC / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_CVC_DAYS_SUM * 1000,
    PVC_I = PVC / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PVC_DAYS_ANY_SUM * 100,
    PVC_D = PVC / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PVC_DAYS_SUM * 1000,
    CSF_I = CSF / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_ANY_SUM * 100,
    CSF_D = CSF / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_SUM * 1000,
    .keep = "none")

total_sepsis_rates = total_sepses |> dplyr::bind_cols(total_denominators) |>
  mutate(
    Tot_I = Tot / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_ANY_SUM * 100,
    Tot_D = Tot / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_SUM * 1000,
    BSI_I = BSI / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_ANY_SUM * 100,
    BSI_D = BSI / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_SUM * 1000,
    CoNS_I = CoNS / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_ANY_SUM * 100,
    CoNS_D = CoNS / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_SUM * 1000,
    Clin_I = Clin / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_ANY_SUM * 100,
    Clin_D = Clin / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_SUM * 1000,
    CVC_I = CVC / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_CVC_DAYS_ANY_SUM * 100,
    CVC_D = CVC / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_CVC_DAYS_SUM * 1000,
    PVC_I = PVC / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PVC_DAYS_ANY_SUM * 100,
    PVC_D = PVC / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PVC_DAYS_SUM * 1000,
    CSF_I = CSF / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_ANY_SUM * 100,
    CSF_D = CSF / NEOIPC_SURVEILLANCE_END_PATIENT_DAYS_SUM * 1000,
    .keep = "none")

#sepsis_rate_quartiles <- department_sepsis_rates |> select(!department) |> reframe(across(everything(), ~DescTools::QuantileCI(.x, prob=c(.25,.5,.75))))

sepsis_rate_quartiles <- department_sepsis_rates |> select(!department) |> reframe(across(everything(), ~quantile(.x, prob = c(.25,.5,.75))))

```
